products.name: AquaPure Crystal 500ml
products.description: Premium purified drinking water in crystal-clear PET bottle with holographic label.
products.notes: Best seller. Handle with care during summer — expand slightly in heat.
products.instructions: Stack max 5 cartons high. Store in cool dry area.

products.name: AquaPure Crystal 1L
products.description: Premium purified drinking water — 1 litre family size.
products.notes: Same label design as 500ml. Different carton.

products.name: FreshSqueeze Orange Juice
products.description: Cold-pressed orange juice in premium glass bottle.
products.notes: Fragile! Glass bottles. Use foam dividers.

products.name: FreshSqueeze Mango Nectar
products.description: Tropical mango nectar in premium glass bottle.

products.name: VitaBoost Energy Drink
products.description: High-caffeine energy drink with taurine and B-vitamins.
products.notes: Do NOT shake before opening. Pressurized.

products.name: HerbalEase Green Tea
products.description: Organic green tea with honey and lemon.
products.notes: New product line. Premium shelf placement.
products.instructions: Store below 25°C. Keep away from strong odors.

products.name: CleanWash Pro Detergent
products.notes: Chemical product — keep separate from food items.
products.instructions: Do not stack more than 3 high. Keep upright.

products.name: CleanWash Pro Detergent 2L
products.description: Professional-grade liquid laundry detergent — economy size.
products.instructions: Do not stack more than 2 high. Keep upright.

products.name: GlowSkin Hand Wash
products.description: Antibacterial hand wash with moisturizing formula.
products.notes: Pump mechanism — test before bulk packaging.

products.name: GlowSkin Body Lotion
products.description: Daily moisturizing body lotion with vitamin E.
products.instructions: Store in cool dry place. Keep upright.

products.name: SparkleClean Glass Spray
products.notes: Trigger spray — ensure nozzle is locked for shipping.
products.instructions: Lock trigger during transport. Store upright.

products.name: NaturaBrew Coffee Cold Brew
products.description: Premium cold brew coffee — single origin beans.
products.notes: Fragile glass. Premium product — special shelf.

products.name: AquaPure Sparkling Water
products.notes: Carbonated — do not shake or drop.

products.name: FloraScent Room Freshener
products.description: Long-lasting room freshener spray — lavender scent.
products.notes: Pressurized container. Handle with extreme care.
products.instructions: Do not expose to heat above 50°C. Do not pierce.

products.name: PureOlive Cooking Oil
products.description: Extra virgin olive oil — cold pressed.
products.notes: Premium product. Dark glass protects from light.
products.instructions: Handle carefully. Glass bottle. Store in dark area.

products.name: VitaBoost Sport Hydration
products.notes: New design — sport cap with pull mechanism.
products.instructions: Store in cool area. Avoid freezing.
